scenes.prompt: Fast, punchy, high-energy TikTok-style beauty b-roll: extreme close-up of glowing dewy skin catching soft light, slow-motion droplet, a swirl of soft steam, dynamic snappy camera push-ins and whip motion, luxe med-spa ambiance, bokeh highlights, cinematic color grade. Vertical 9:16. No people talking, no on-screen text, no UI, no watermarks.
